specific_location: On the south west side of Jumbo Reservoir. They were in the cattails between Jumbo Reservoir and Little Jumbo Reservoir. We were able to hear it from both reservoirs.
description: We never saw any birds.Behaviors: It was singing and calling from cattails.Call: It gave a cu, cu, cu, cu, cu song while getting faster towards the end of the song. It also gave a different call. It was more like co-oooo, it was almost dove like (recordings of both, but only one in WAV file so far).Plumage: unknown
